text: Trump flies partway home from Turkey in an old Air Force One - NPR
fullText: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again.
